expected.notes: Invariant: lightweight chat should stay lightweight.
Invariant: document authoring from notes should NOT trigger repo mutation.
Invariant: extraction from supplied docs should not drift into authoring or repo edits.
Invariant: image/visual creation should stay artifact-first and avoid repo mutation.
Invariant: comparing structured local files should stay analytical, not browser/repo driven.
Invariant: pure calculation should not pull in tool-heavy execution by default.
Invariant: repo fix plus validation should stay code-execution focused, not browser/research.
Invariant: live page inspection should use browser capability, not repo edits or public research.
Invariant: latest public research should stay web-research-first, not browser-driving or repo editing.
Invariant: explicit production delivery should stay delivery-first without silently turning into repo edits.
